items.title: Kartik Tyagi rises to fifth on IPL 2026 Purple Cap table

items.title: Martinez breaks finger... then helps Villa win Europa League
items.summary: Aston Villa goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez reveals he broke his finger during the warm-up before his side's Europa League final win against Freiburg.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
